title: Selected Works
explanation: Here you'll find a selection of projects that represent my journey as a web developer with more than three years of experience. This portfolio includes both freelance work and collaborations with companies, all centered around modern front-end and CMS development. My focus areas include React, JavaScript, Sass, WordPress (including custom theme development with PHP), and headless CMS architecture. Each project reflects my commitment to building responsive, user-friendly, and technically solid digital experiences.

projects.name: Vansun Studio
projects.alt: Screenshot of Vansun Studio booking website
projects.shortDescription: A fully custom booking website for a piercing and tattoo studio, built from scratch with React and WordPress headless CMS.
projects.overview: Vansun Studio is a fully responsive, feature-rich booking platform for a Vancouver-based tattoo and piercing studio. The website is built entirely from scratch, integrating a custom-built React frontend with WordPress as a headless CMS and WooCommerce for appointment handling. It includes advanced features such as a consent form, custom booking logic, and smooth animations to enhance user experience.

Technologies: React: Used for creating reusable and dynamic UI components.
WordPress Headless CMS: Provides content management via REST API.
WooCommerce: Manages booking products and handles checkout processes.
ACF (Advanced Custom Fields): Powers dynamic availability per service.
SASS: Enables scalable and modular styling.
Framer Motion: Adds smooth and modern UI animations.
Features: Custom Booking System: Fully developed booking workflow with availability slots, connected directly to WooCommerce products.
Consent Form Integration: A digital consent form tailored for the studio’s service flow.
Admin-Friendly CMS: Studio content, services, and availability managed easily via WordPress backend.
Responsive & Mobile-First: Optimized UX for all screen sizes.
Enhanced Animations: Clean transitions and hover effects enhance the feel.
SEO & Performance: Optimized loading speed and metadata for search engines.
Contributions: Designed and developed the entire project from scratch, from UX/UI to full functionality.
Wrote all frontend and backend integration logic using React and REST API calls.
Built WooCommerce booking logic, including custom functions for availability and validation.
Integrated ACF for dynamic service time slots and synced it with React UI components.
Implemented a custom digital consent form workflow integrated into the booking system.
Handled full deployment and post-launch updates, ensuring performance and stability.

projects.name: Tattnix
projects.alt: Screenshot of Tattnix AI tattoo recommendation app
projects.shortDescription: An AI-powered tattoo recommendation app that generates personalized designs through an interactive quiz.
projects.overview: Tattnix is an AI-powered tattoo recommendation app that helps users discover personalized tattoo ideas through an interactive quiz. Based on the user’s answers, the app generates a custom tattoo design and description, provides a preview, and allows users to securely unlock and download the full result through an integrated payment system. Built for both web and mobile, Tattnix combines AI image generation, responsive design, and secure digital payments in a smooth user experience.

Technologies: React Native
Expo
TypeScript
React Native Web
Supabase
Supabase Edge Functions
PostgreSQL
OpenAI API
Square Payments API
Apple Pay
Google Pay
Vercel
REST APIs
Git and GitHub
Features: Interactive tattoo-style recommendation quiz
AI-generated tattoo design previews
Personalized tattoo descriptions based on quiz responses
Blurred preview and paywall-based content unlocking
Secure card payments through Square
Apple Pay and Google Pay support
Downloadable high-resolution tattoo designs
Responsive experience across web and mobile devices
Payment verification before accessing premium content
QR-code-friendly flow designed for use in tattoo studios
Real-time backend processing with Supabase Edge Functions
Contributions: Designed and developed the complete application flow from quiz completion to AI-generated results
Built the front end using React Native, Expo, and TypeScript
Created a responsive web version using React Native Web
Integrated the OpenAI API to generate personalized tattoo images and descriptions
Developed Supabase Edge Functions for preview generation, payment processing, and webhook handling
Designed and managed the PostgreSQL payment database structure
Integrated Square’s production payment system, including card payments, Apple Pay, and Google Pay
Implemented secure payment validation to prevent unpaid access to premium results
Configured CORS, environment variables, API keys, and production endpoints
Deployed and maintained the application on Vercel
Connected the custom domain and prepared the application for mobile store deployment
Tested and debugged the application across desktop, mobile, Safari, and Chrome

projects.name: Redtattoo
projects.alt: Screenshot of Red Tattoo studio website
projects.shortDescription: A React front-end with WordPress CMS for a tattoo studio portfolio and custom booking flow.
projects.overview: Red Tattoo is a custom-built website for a tattoo studio, combining an online portfolio with a booking platform. Customers can browse past work, learn about the artist, and book appointments. The front end is built with React, while WordPress powers the backend and content management.

Technologies: Frontend: React
CMS / Backend: WordPress
Backend & Logic: PHP
Database: MySQL
Hosting: SiteGround
Features: Portfolio section to showcase artwork
Custom-designed booking system
Consent form submission and storage
Booking emails sent to both artist and customer
Fully responsive design, mobile-optimized
Contributions: Built the React front end for portfolio and booking flows
Set up WordPress as the CMS and backend
Designed and customized the booking system from scratch
Implemented consent form handling and booking email notifications
Ensured the site is SEO-ready and performance-tuned
Provided post-launch support and documentation

projects.name: Granville Tattoo
projects.alt: Screenshot of Granville Tattoo headless website
projects.shortDescription: Granville Tattoo: A headless Next.js and WordPress experience for a Vancouver studio.
projects.overview: Granville Tattoo is a headless web experience built with Next.js on the front end and WordPress powering content through the REST API. The architecture balances high-performance rendering with flexible content management, pairing modern UI interactions with a tightly integrated booking workflow.

Technologies: Next.js: Front-end framework for fast, SEO-ready rendering and routing.
WordPress Headless CMS: Delivers structured content via the REST API.
Custom WordPress Plugin: Powers the booking workflow, including appointments and confirmations.
SASS Modules: Provides scalable styling with studio-specific design system.
Features: Dynamic content delivery from WordPress without sacrificing front-end performance.
Real-time booking system supporting appointment requests, artist scheduling, and automated confirmations.
Artist and portfolio galleries tailored for each tattooist.
High-performance rendering with image optimization and caching.
Contributions: Architected the headless stack, connecting Next.js with WordPress REST endpoints.
Developed the custom booking plugin managing appointments, schedules, and confirmations.
Implemented reusable UI components and animations for the portfolio and booking flows.
Handled deployment and performance optimization across the stack.

projects.name: Call Me Guide
projects.alt: Screenshot of Mahdi Roozbahani's portfolio website
projects.shortDescription: Call Me Guide: A platform offering real-time travel guidance with a user-friendly interface and secure payment integration.
projects.overview: This is a platform offering real-time travel guidance with a user-friendly interface and secure payment integration.

Client: Call Me Guide Tourism Service Inc

Technologies: JavaScript Frameworks: React (used for building dynamic user interfaces), Emotion (CSS-in-JS styling for modular and scalable components)
Web Frameworks: Laravel (used for backend functionality, routing, and RESTful APIs)
Programming Languages: PHP (applied in WordPress theme development and backend logic), JavaScript (core language for frontend interactivity and logic)
Security: Google reCAPTCHA (implemented for spam protection in forms)
Features: Secure payments via Stripe: Providing seamless and secure payment processing for users.
Interactive maps using the Google Maps API: Enabling users to explore travel destinations in real-time.
Real-time travel guidance and support: Offering travelers immediate and accurate travel assistance.
Contributions: Founder and main architect of the platform
Led the overall project management and development
Coordinated collaboration between frontend, backend, and design teams
Oversaw the entire project lifecycle to ensure business and technical alignment
Enhanced user experience through real-time updates and intuitive navigation
Worked on frontend design and interactivity using React

projects.name: Electricity Forum
projects.shortDescription: A professional platform for electrical industry discussions, resources, and community engagement.
projects.overview: Electricity Forum is a comprehensive web platform designed for electrical engineers, technicians, and industry professionals. The site serves as a hub for technical discussions, industry news, and educational resources. Built with a focus on performance and user experience, the platform facilitates knowledge sharing and professional networking within the electrical engineering community.

Technologies: PHP: Backend functionality and server-side logic for dynamic content management
JavaScript: Enhanced interactivity and modern UI features
CSS/SASS: Modern styling with responsive design principles
HTML5: Semantic markup for improved accessibility and SEO
MySQL: Database management for user content and forum data
Features: Dynamic content management system for articles and discussions
Responsive design optimized for all devices and screen sizes
Modern UI with enhanced user experience and intuitive navigation
Optimized front-end performance for fast page loads
SEO-friendly structure for improved search engine visibility
Contributions: Developed and maintained front-end components using modern JavaScript and CSS
Implemented PHP-based functionality for the company's website backend
Created new web pages with focus on user experience and accessibility
Enhanced UI with modern CSS techniques and responsive design patterns
Optimized front-end performance through code optimization and best practices
Collaborated with the team to implement new features and improvements
Ensured cross-browser compatibility and consistent user experience

projects.name: pacificpeak
projects.alt: Screenshot of Mahdi Roozbahani's portfolio website
projects.shortDescription: A modern and responsive portfolio website built with React to showcase projects and skills.
projects.overview: This is a new business project built with WordPress. The project is currently ongoing and has not been fully launched yet. Pacific Peaks offers adventure tours ranging from one-day to multi-day options in all four seasons with various packages.

Technologies: WordPress and WooCommerce: The platform is built using these powerful tools for flexibility and e-commerce functionality.
Custom WordPress theme: A fully customized theme developed to meet the unique needs of the business.
PHP: Custom backend code written to manage specific functionalities of the site.
SASS: Applied for a more structured and maintainable approach to styling.
Security and SEO plugins: Integrated to ensure optimal performance and security.
Features: Booking System: Integrated booking functionality with availability calendars for real-time tour scheduling.
Interactive Maps: Users can view tour routes and destinations via interactive maps.
Responsive Design: Ensures compatibility across all devices, from desktops to smartphones.
Animations: Smooth text and image animations powered by CSS and Framer Motion for enhanced user experience
Contributions: Collaborated in the initial planning phase of the project
Focused on backend development, writing custom PHP code for the WordPress theme
Worked extensively on styling the pages using SASS to ensure a polished and consistent design
Contributed to the integration of WooCommerce and other WordPress functionalities
Helped implement SEO and security plugins to enhance the performance and safety of the website
